name: project
description: The purpose of this repository is for you to have a shared location for you to collaborate.  It's important that you check in your files and progress into this repository so there is a record of the progress your group has made.  You may create your own organization for working.  I encourage you to create a directory for each milestone's deliverables so that they are easy for me to find when I grade your work.  For example, create a milestone1 directory where you'll put your milestone1.pdf file.
